title: Rebuild nusyq-bridge after unexpected state drift
details: NuSyQ bridge startup state drift detected after restart. Compare hashes d1407cce57e8e2ff80c1b2381937eab771f3126c9fbc9bca969709d9a5e0e9c8 -> 7483eff60aaf7ea76e0f33f8bbc1759bbad9a49cd57c0618abd0057b00e4b0bc and inspect bridge_state_diff.json.
